title: 2026 Grammy predictions: Final odds favor Bad Bunny, Lady Gaga, and 'KPop Demon Hunters'
text: According to Gold Derby's predictions, Olivia Dean leads the Best New Artist category with 74% odds to win. The complete breakdown of contenders includes Olivia Dean at 74%, followed by Katseye, The Marías, Addison Rae, Sombr, Leon Thomas, Alex Warren, and Lola Young. The article provides comprehensive analysis showing Dean's substantial probability advantage in the race, which represents her position as the overwhelming favorite heading into the February 1st Grammy Awards ceremony.
